title: Double note selection pattern needs defending comment
description: send_payment() calls select_with_fee() once to get selected_ids for post-broadcast marking, then passes all_notes to build_shielded_tx() which re-selects internally. A well-intentioned contributor will see this and try to pass the already-selected notes directly to the builder, bypassing the internal selection. This is wrong: build_shielded_tx() must receive the full candidate set to enforce its fee-calculation invariants and anchor checks. The current double-selection comment (payment.rs lines 178–183) explains this, but does not explicitly warn against the 'obvious simplification' of passing the pre-selected set. Worth hardening the comment.
close_reason: Already documented. payment.rs lines 185–196 have a 10-line comment explicitly explaining the double-selection invariant, why passing selected (not all_notes) to build_shielded_tx would break it, and the INVARIANT warning. Nothing to add.
